diagrams.title: Thread States and Transitions
diagrams.description: Shows the lifecycle of a thread from creation to termination with all possible state transitions
elements: Transitions: New→Ready, Ready→Running, Running→Ready, Running→Blocked, Blocked→Ready, Running→Terminated
diagrams.purpose: Understand thread execution flow and context switching in OS

diagrams.title: Multithreading Models Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of three multithreading models showing mapping between user-level and kernel-level threads
diagrams.purpose: Understand how different OS architectures handle thread management and parallelism

diagrams.title: Producer-Consumer Problem
diagrams.description: Bounded buffer problem showing producer and consumer threads with semaphores synchronizing access to shared buffer
diagrams.purpose: Learn practical thread synchronization using semaphores in classic concurrency problem
